data.text: Just discovered a critical bug in our authentication system. Users can't log in after the latest update. This needs immediate attention! #bug #authentication
Feature request: It would be amazing to have real-time collaboration features. Think Google Docs but for our platform. Who else wants this?
The new UI is confusing. Can we get a dark mode option? My eyes are burning after working late nights. Please consider this! 🌙
Performance issue: The app takes forever to load on mobile devices. Is anyone else experiencing this? We need optimization ASAP.
Suggestion: Add export to PDF functionality. Would be super useful for generating reports. Many users have been asking for this feature.
